titleStmt.title: SII 22.51: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 51. (A.R. No. 51 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME GŌPURA. PERUMĀḶ SUNDARA PĀṆḌYA-Date Lost.

summary.p: This is damaged. It seems to record an endowment in money of 125 [kaḻañju] by some merchants of Kulaśēkharaṉ-pāṭṭinam, to provide for the various requirements in connection with the worship of the deity in the month of Mārgaḻi, in the temple of Kālakāladēvar at Tirukkaḍavūr. This place is referred to as a brahmadēya in the eastern division (Kīḻ-kūṟu) of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭuk kiḻkūṟṟu brahmadeyam
tirukkaṭavūr Uṭaiyār kālakālatevaṟku tirumārkaḻit tirumañcaṉat tukku Āṭi
aruḷavum Amutuceyya cāttuppaṭikkum Amutupaṭikkum perumāḷ cuntarapāṇṭiya
vatu mārkaḻimātamutal kulacekaraṉpaṭṭiṉattu viyāpāri kaḷum ka
ka niccayitta cantaṉam tulā m 1- ṉāl Eṭai
nir 2 10 5 10 paccaikkaṟpūram 7 10 3 10 kuṅkuma
tu 5 10 tiruppāvāṭai ku ṟu5 100 paruppu teṅkāy karuppukka
ṭṭi neyyamutu miḷaku Uḷḷiṭṭa veñcaṉattukkum Aṭai
kkāyamutu Ilaiyamutukkum tiruppaḷḷittāmattukkum niccayitta �100 2 10 5 tirumañcaṉam
paṇṇa tirupparivaṭṭattukku neṭu muḻavaṉ paṭṭu Ippaṭi Ivvāṇṭu mutal ca
ntirātittavaraiyum Eṅkaḷ piḷḷaikaḷ ceytu potuvatāka Aṟuḷi Iṭṭapaṭikku
Uṭaiyār tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭikkoḷḷak kaṭavatāṉamaikku
ṉṉeḻuttu ceḻiyatarayaṉeḻuttu villavatarayaṉeḻuttu
ṉeḻuttu pāṇṭiyatarayaṉeḻuttu vaṇikapurantaraṉeḻuttu
ḻuttu kaliyukameyyaṉeḻuttu kaṇṇuṭaiyp perumā ḷeḻuttu
ḻuttu kulacekara Atiyarayaṉeḻuttu yātavakula ḻuttu varāti
varātittaṉeḻuttu yātava cakkaravattiyeḻuttu pāttivarāya
ṉeḻuttu vatāṇṭāṉeḻuttu ṉeḻuttu Āḷuṭaiya piḷḷai
Eḻuttu ventaṉ campanta ṉeḻuttu Inta sambandappaṭi kalveṭṭivitta Ācaitirk
ku muppāraṉ tirukkaṭavūr rācāriyaṉeḻuttu Itu periyapiḷḷai
Digital edition of SII 22.51 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
